languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, я вспомнил о еще нескольких делах, требующих внима..." {n}— встрепенувшийся было Данрок благоразумно умолкает, столкнувшись с вашим взглядом. На несколько секунд воцаряется гнетущая тишина, нарушаемая лишь низким шипением аугментических легких Себериана. {/n}

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан, я вспомнил о еще нескольких делах, требующих внима..." {n}— встрепенувшийся было Данрок благоразумно умолкает, столкнувшись с вашим взглядом. На несколько секунд воцаряется гнетущая тишина, нарушаемая лишь низким шипением аугментических легких Себериана. {/n}
traits.speaker: HighFactotum

languages.text: "Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten—" {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls still upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, я вспомнил о еще нескольких делах, требующих внима..." {n}— встрепенувшийся было Данрок благоразумно умолкает, столкнувшись с вашим взглядом. На несколько секунд воцаряется гнетущая тишина, нарушаемая лишь низким шипением аугментических легких Себериана. {/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten..." {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls silent upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}

"Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten—" {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls still upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}

"Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten—" {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls still upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}

"Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten—" {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls still upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, ahora recuerdo que hay otros asuntos que requieren mi aten...». {n}Danrok, que ya había empezado a moverse, se lo piensa dos veces y se detiene en cuanto lo miras a los ojos. Durante un instante reina el silencio, interrumpido únicamente por el tenue siseo de los pulmones auméticos de Seberian.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten—" {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls still upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán, ahora recuerdo que hay otros asuntos que requieren mi aten...». {n}Danrok, que ya había empezado a moverse, se lo piensa dos veces y se detiene en cuanto lo miras a los ojos. Durante un instante reina el silencio, interrumpido únicamente por el tenue siseo de los pulmones auméticos de Seberian.{/n}

languages.text: “舰长大人，我突然想起来还有几件事需要我去……”{n}丹罗克刚想动弹，一迎上你的目光，立马识趣地待在了原地。随后几秒钟，沉重的寂静笼罩着四周，只能听见塞贝里安那植入物肺部发出的低沉嘶鸣声。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten—" {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls still upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，我突然想起来还有几件事需要我去……”{n}丹罗克刚想动弹，一迎上你的目光，立马识趣地待在了原地。随后几秒钟，沉重的寂静笼罩着四周，只能听见塞贝里安那植入物肺部发出的低沉嘶鸣声。{/n}

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, plusieurs autres affaires nécessitent mon att... » {n}Un instant à peine après avoir pris la parole, Danrok s'interrompt avec sagesse sur un seul regard de votre part. L'espace de quelques secondes, un silence de mort s'abat tout autour de vous, que seul vient rompre le sifflement grave des poumons bioniques de Seberian.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten—" {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls still upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, plusieurs autres affaires nécessitent mon att... » {n}Un instant à peine après avoir pris la parole, Danrok s'interrompt avec sagesse sur un seul regard de votre part. L'espace de quelques secondes, un silence de mort s'abat tout autour de vous, que seul vient rompre le sifflement grave des poumons bioniques de Seberian.{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, ilgilenmem gereken birkaç başka mesele daha hatırladım..." {n}Hareketlenen Danrok, bakışlarınla karşılaşınca akıllıca hareketsiz kalıyor. Birkaç saniyeliğine ağır bir sessizlik hüküm sürüyor. Sessizliği bozan tek şey, Seberian'ın ogmetik ciğerlerinin boğuk tıslaması.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten—" {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls still upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, ilgilenmem gereken birkaç başka mesele daha hatırladım..." {n}Hareketlenen Danrok, bakışlarınla karşılaşınca akıllıca hareketsiz kalıyor. Birkaç saniyeliğine ağır bir sessizlik hüküm sürüyor. Sessizliği bozan tek şey, Seberian'ın ogmetik ciğerlerinin boğuk tıslaması.{/n}

languages.text: 「艦長、他に私が注意を払う必要がある事項をいくつか思い出しました」{n}ダンロックは、動いていたところを、あなたの視線に気づいて賢く静止している。数秒間、重く沈黙が支配し、シベリアンの増設肺の低いヒス音だけがそれを破る。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten—" {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls still upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「艦長、他に私が注意を払う必要がある事項をいくつか思い出しました」{n}ダンロックは、動いていたところを、あなたの視線に気づいて賢く静止している。数秒間、重く沈黙が支配し、シベリアンの増設肺の低いヒス音だけがそれを破る。{/n}

languages.text: "Lord Captain, ich muss mich noch um verschiedene andere Angelegen..." {n}Als er deinen Blick bemerkt, zieht es Danrok klugerweise vor, zu schweigen. Einige Sekunden lang herrscht eine angespannte Stille, die nur durch das leise Zischen von Seberians augmetischer Lunge gestört wird.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, I have recalled several other matters requiring my atten..." {n}Danrok, who had stirred, wisely falls silent upon meeting your gaze. For a few seconds, a heavy silence reigns, broken only by the low hiss of Seberian's augmetic lungs.{/n}

Einige Sekunden lang herrscht eine angespannte Stille, die nur durch das leise Zischen von Seberians augmetischer Lunge gestört wird.{/n}
